title: Checklist for researchers: 6 steps to retain your rights
author: Ignasi Labastida
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This checklist is to support researchers. It is part of the RetainYourRights campaign from Project Retain, led by SPARC Europe as part of the Knowledge Rights 21 Programme. 

 This project was funded by Arcadia – a charitable fund of Lisbet Rausing and Peter Baldwin.
